Core Activities

  • Turnkey Project in Industrial Construction

    Warehouses, Factories, Tank Farm, Infrastructure works, PEB Steel Buildings, Complete MEP System, Sandwich panel Roofing & Wall Cladding work, Standing Seam Roofing, ACP Cladding, Curtain wall, Accoustic Panels, Man Safe System including Cat walk, Interior Fitouts
